no: Only a few items, and each can be disabled in an .ini. Let this go after IR or FA' changes Improved Rods of Lordly Might and Terror overlaps with ZSTweaks' similar components for the rods of Terror and Lordly Might
sum: Rebalances the Rod of Terror by limiting its charisma drain to 8 hours, and strengthens the three Lordly weapons with boosted enchantment bonuses and special combat effects.

new:

When activated, this rod may be used as a staff +3. Any creature hit by the rod must make a Saving Throw vs. Spell or flee in terror, fearing the wielder as if he or she were a flesh-eating demon from the Abyss. There is a drawback to using this rod, however: Each time the rod is used, there is a 20% chance that the wielder loses one point of Charisma permanently.

STATISTICS:

Combat abilities:
– Target must save vs. Spell at +4 or flee in terror for 4 rounds
– 20% chance per use of the wielder losing 1 point of Charisma permanently

THAC0: +3
Damage: 1d6+3 (crushing)
Speed Factor: 1
Proficiency Type: Quarterstaff
Type: Two-handed

Weight: 3

advisories.reason: Both modify Rod of Terror (RODS05.itm) and Rod of Lordly Might (RODS02.itm). Last installed wins
advisories.theirComps: #1587 Rod of Terror / #1190 Rod of Lordly Might
